# Security Policy

If you believe you've found a security vulnerability in any software under the EoSApplications organization, please report it privately rather than filing a public issue or pull request.

- Preferred: use GitHub's private vulnerability reporting feature on the relevant repository (its Security tab -> "Report a vulnerability").
- Alternative: email Heidi N. Krauss (Heidi.N.Krauss@gmail.com) or Allison Pease (apease13@asu.edu) directly, with "SECURITY" in the subject line.

Please do not report security issues through public GitHub issues discussions, or pull requests, since anyone can read those on a public repo.

This file is the organization-wide default, used by any EoSApplications repository that doesn't have its own `SECURITY.md`.
